'''dhozhadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:byssal|byssal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:byssal|byssal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhozhadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozhadhithi|dhozhadhithi]] || [[word:dhozhadhiji|dhozhadhiji]] || [[word:dhozhadhishi|dhozhadhishi]] || [[word:dhozhadhiki|dhozhadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozhadhuthuthu|dhozhadhuthuthu]] || [[word:dhozhadhujuju|dhozhadhujuju]] || [[word:dhozhadhushushu|dhozhadhushushu]] || [[word:dhozhadhukuku|dhozhadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozhadhuthu|dhozhadhuthu]] || [[word:dhozhadhuju|dhozhadhuju]] || [[word:dhozhadhushu|dhozhadhushu]] || [[word:dhozhadhuku|dhozhadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozhadhufthuf|dhozhadhufthuf]] || [[word:dhozhadhufjuf|dhozhadhufjuf]] || [[word:dhozhadhufshuf|dhozhadhufshuf]] || [[word:dhozhadhufkuf|dhozhadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozhadhethe|dhozhadhethe]] || [[word:dhozhadheje|dhozhadheje]] || [[word:dhozhadheshe|dhozhadheshe]] || [[word:dhozhadheke|dhozhadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozhadhothotho|dhozhadhothotho]] || [[word:dhozhadhojojo|dhozhadhojojo]] || [[word:dhozhadhoshosho|dhozhadhoshosho]] || [[word:dhozhadhokoko|dhozhadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozhadhotho|dhozhadhotho]] || [[word:dhozhadhojo|dhozhadhojo]] || [[word:dhozhadhosho|dhozhadhosho]] || [[word:dhozhadhoko|dhozhadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozhadhofthof|dhozhadhofthof]] || [[word:dhozhadhofjof|dhozhadhofjof]] || [[word:dhozhadhofshof|dhozhadhofshof]] || [[word:dhozhadhofkof|dhozhadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|dhozhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŠthĂŠ|dhozhadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŠjĂŠ|dhozhadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŠshĂŠ|dhozhadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhozhadhĂŠkĂŠ|dhozhadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhozhadhathatha|dhozhadhathatha]] || [[word:dhozhadhajaja|dhozhadhajaja]] || [[word:dhozhadhashasha|dhozhadhashasha]] || [[word:dhozhadhakaka|dhozhadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhozhadhatha|dhozhadhatha]] || [[word:dhozhadhaja|dhozhadhaja]] || [[word:dhozhadhasha|dhozhadhasha]] || [[word:dhozhadhaka|dhozhadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhozhadhafthaf|dhozhadhafthaf]] || [[word:dhozhadhafjaf|dhozhadhafjaf]] || [[word:dhozhadhafshaf|dhozhadhafshaf]] || [[word:dhozhadhafkaf|dhozhadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhozhadhasha|dhozhadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhozhadhshĂ«sha|dhozhadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhozhadhrosha|dhozhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhozhadhmusha|dhozhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhozhadhyasha|dhozhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhozhadhnkshĂ«sha|godhozhadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhozhadhnkrosha|godhozhadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhozhadhnkmusha|godhozhadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhozhadhnkyasha|godhozhadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhozhazhadhasha|dhozhazhadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhozhazhadhshĂ«sha|dhozhazhadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhozhazhadhrosha|dhozhazhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhozhazhadhmusha|dhozhazhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhozhazhadhyasha|dhozhazhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhozhazhadhnkshĂ«sha|godhozhazhadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhozhazhadhnkrosha|godhozhazhadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhozhazhadhnkmusha|godhozhazhadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhozhazhadhnkyasha|godhozhazhadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhezhĂŠdhasha|dhezhĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhezhĂŠdhshĂ«sha|dhezhĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhezhĂŠdhrosha|dhezhĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhezhĂŠdhmusha|dhezhĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhezhĂŠdhyasha|dhezhĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhezhĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|godhezhĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhezhĂŠdhnkrosha|godhezhĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhezhĂŠdhnkmusha|godhezhĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhezhĂŠdhnkyasha|godhezhĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhozhfadhasha|dhozhfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhozhfadhshĂ«sha|dhozhfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhozhfadhrosha|dhozhfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhozhfadhmusha|dhozhfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhozhfadhyasha|dhozhfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhozhfadhnkshĂ«sha|godhozhfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhozhfadhnkrosha|godhozhfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhozhfadhnkmusha|godhozhfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhozhfadhnkyasha|godhozhfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
